title.zh_tw: Beginner Grammar Lesson 01 · 第一次見面先把語氣說對
title.en: Beginner Grammar Lesson 01 · Choose the right speech level in a first meeting

subtitle.zh_tw: 正式 / 日常 / 朋友語氣

zh_tw: 能先分出正式、日常、朋友三種說法
能把同一句切成 different speech level 版本
能在第一次見面先穩定用 해요體 開口
en: Tell formal, everyday, and casual speech apart.
Switch the same sentence into different speech levels.
Start a first meeting safely with 해요체.

title.zh_tw: 文法 02：三大核心助詞 (은/는, 이/가, 을/를)
title.en: Grammar 02: The Three Core Particles (은/는, 이/가, 을/를)

subtitle.zh_tw: 誰在說話、誰在做事、動作的對象
subtitle.en: Who is talking, who is doing, and the object of action

zh_tw: 你能區分 은/는 和 이/가 的使用場景 (主題 vs 主語)。
你能正確在受詞後加上 을/를。
你能區分『我是學生』(一般介紹) 和『我才是學生』(指名主角) 的差別。
你能正確造出包含主語、受詞、動詞的簡單動作句。
en: Distinguish between 은/는 and 이/가 (Topic vs Subject).
Correctly apply the object markers 을/를.
Tell the difference between 'I am a student' (intro) and 'I (am the one who) am a student' (focus).
Build basic sentence structures including subject, object, and verb.

subtitle.zh_tw: 在哪裡、幾點、在哪裡做事
subtitle.en: Where, what time, and where things happen
